title: neoschumannia gishwatiensis
intro: Neoschumannia gishwatiensis is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, native to the Democratic Republic of the Congo. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, contributing to its potential health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. Neoschumannia gishwatiensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing for the extraction of its bioactive compounds and utilization of its medicinal properties.
